title.en: What to watch for after Jensen Huang’s Japan visit
title.zh: 黄仁勋访日后需要注意什么

summary.en: Jensen Huang left Tokyo with deals spanning Japan's entire tech ecosystem.
summary.zh: 黄仁勋带着跨越日本整个科技生态系统的交易离开了东京。

title.en: Can an Apple lawsuit derail OpenAI’s hardware plans?
title.zh: 苹果的诉讼会破坏 OpenAI 的硬件计划吗？

summary.en: On the latest episode of Equity, we debate whether Apple's lawsuit will cast over OpenAi's much-discussed plans to get into hardware and go public.
summary.zh: 在最新一期的《Equity》节目中，我们讨论了苹果的诉讼是否会影响 OpenAi 备受讨论的进军硬件和上市的计划。

title.en: I hate that I don’t hate this song made with Suno
title.zh: 我讨厌我不讨厌这首和Suno一起做的歌

summary.en: I would never go so far as to say there's no place for AI in music (I'm a fan of Holly Herndon, after all). But I generally find music made with generative AI to be offensively bo…
summary.zh: 我绝不会说人工智能在音乐中没有立足之地（毕竟我是 Holly Herndon 的粉丝）。但我通常认为用生成式人工智能制作的音乐具有攻击性……

title.en: Dave Eggers told OpenAI staff that ChatGPT was ‘silencing an entire generation’
title.zh: Dave Eggers 告诉 OpenAI 员工，ChatGPT 正在“压制整整一代人的声音”

summary.en: Last year, Sam Altman invited author Dave Eggers to give a talk to around 200 OpenAI staffers. The man has written countless novels, screenplays, pieces of journalism, started McS…
summary.zh: 去年，Sam Altman 邀请作家 Dave Eggers 为大约 200 名 OpenAI 员工发表演讲。这个人写了无数的小说、剧本、新闻文章，创办了 McS……

title.en: A scorecard for the AI age
title.zh: 人工智能时代的记分卡

summary.en: Sarah Friar, CFO of OpenAI, introduces a practical AI scorecard to measure ROI through useful work, cost per successful task, dependability, and return on compute.
summary.zh: OpenAI 首席财务官 Sarah Friar 推出了实用的 AI 记分卡，通过有用的工作、每项成功任务的成本、可靠性和计算回报来衡量投资回报率。

title.en: The risk of weather data sabotage is rising
title.zh: 天气数据遭到破坏的风险正在上升

summary.en: Every morning, airline dispatchers, grid operators, and farmers around the world make decisions based on the same thing: a weather forecast. While these forecasts are something th…
summary.zh: 每天早上，世界各地的航空公司调度员、电网运营商和农民都会根据同一件事做出决策：天气预报。虽然这些预测是……

title.en: The AI compute gap: Enterprises are buying infrastructure faster than they can measure what it costs
title.zh: 人工智能计算差距：企业购买基础设施的速度快于他们能够衡量其成本的速度

summary.en: Across 107 enterprises, AI infrastructure spending is accelerating well ahead of the ability to see or steer its economics. Most organizations run their AI on a familiar base of h…
summary.zh: 在 107 家企业中，人工智能基础设施支出的加速增长远远超过了观察或引导其经济的能力。大多数组织都在熟悉的基础上运行人工智能……

title.en: Why teens deserve access to safe AI
title.zh: 为什么青少年应该获得安全的人工智能

summary.en: Learn how OpenAI is making ChatGPT safer for teens with age-appropriate protections, learning tools, parental controls, and expert partnerships.
summary.zh: 了解 OpenAI 如何通过适合年龄的保护、学习工具、家长控制和专家合作伙伴关系，让 ChatGPT 对青少年来说更安全。

summary.en: Google DeepMind and Isomorphic Labs are sharing our joint approach to bioresilience and AI models.
summary.zh: Google DeepMind 和 Isomorphic Labs 正在分享我们在生物弹性和人工智能模型方面的联合方法。

title.en: Now, defenders are embracing the prompt injection, too
title.zh: 现在，防御者也开始接受即时注入

summary.en: "Context bombing" tricks hacking agents into shutting down before they can do harm.
summary.zh: “上下文轰炸”会诱骗黑客代理在造成伤害之前将其关闭。
